news.t: There's never been a semiconductor rally like this one — and that's triggering a number of warnings

holdings.infoBox: SSG is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Proshares Ultrashort Semiconductors (SSG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged inverse exposure to a market-cap-weighted index that tracks the performance of large US semiconductor companies. SSG was launched on Jan 30, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.
